title: crassula longipes
intro: Crassula longipes, also known as the jade hedgehog or crassula hedgehog, is a succulent plant species native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crassula longipes include its potential to reduce fever, improve digestive health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make infusions or teas, which are believed to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
